name: podcastindex-pp-mcp
description: The only PodcastIndex tool that is agent-native and works offline: search, resolve, and analyse any podcast from one signed binary with a local mirror you can FTS and SQL.

podcastindex_key.title: PODCASTINDEX_KEY
podcastindex_key.description: Optional. Sets PODCASTINDEX_KEY for the PodcastIndex MCP server. Get a credential from https://github.com/tbowers/python-podcastindex-org-lambda.

podcastindex_org_api_key.title: PODCASTINDEX_ORG_API_KEY
podcastindex_org_api_key.description: Optional. Sets PODCASTINDEX_ORG_API_KEY for the PodcastIndex MCP server. Get a credential from https://github.com/tbowers/python-podcastindex-org-lambda.

podcastindex_org_authorization.title: PODCASTINDEX_ORG_AUTHORIZATION
podcastindex_org_authorization.description: Sets PODCASTINDEX_ORG_AUTHORIZATION for the PodcastIndex MCP server. Get a credential from https://github.com/tbowers/python-podcastindex-org-lambda.

podcastindex_org_date.title: PODCASTINDEX_ORG_DATE
podcastindex_org_date.description: Sets PODCASTINDEX_ORG_DATE for the PodcastIndex MCP server. Get a credential from https://github.com/tbowers/python-podcastindex-org-lambda.

podcastindex_org_user_agent.title: PODCASTINDEX_ORG_USER_AGENT
podcastindex_org_user_agent.description: Sets PODCASTINDEX_ORG_USER_AGENT for the PodcastIndex MCP server. Get a credential from https://github.com/tbowers/python-podcastindex-org-lambda.
